1. CVE-2024-57726 — SimpleHelp Missing Authorization Vulnerability
2. CVE-2026-41940 — WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared) Missing Authen
3. CVE-2026-39987 — Marimo Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
4. CVE-2024-7399 — Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
5. CVE-2024-1708 — ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
6. CVE-2026-31431 — Linux Kernel Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres Vulner
